mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_statistics t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_statistics t
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.uid) FROM eb_attendance_statistics t

SELECT s.* FROM eb_attendance_statistics s INNER JOIN ( SELECT t.uid AS u, MAX(t.id) AS max_id FROM eb_attendance_statistics t
GROUP BY t.uid ) x ON s.id = x.max_id WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
